Class UserDataTBL

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.users.model.UserDataTBL
@Entity public class UserDataTBL extends Object
JPA Entity representing user profile data in the database.

This class maps to the user_data table and stores user profile information including name, address, and contact details. First and last name getters return "N/A" if the value is null or empty.

Key fields:

  • id - Primary key
  • userloginid - User this profile belongs to
  • firstname - User's first name
  • lastname - User's last name
  • middlename - User's middle name
  • Address fields (address1, address2, city, state, province, country, zipcode)
